name: Process Capability — Cpk, Ppk, DPMO & Sigma Level from Measurement Data
subtitle: Quality Engineering / Six Sigma — ISO 22514-2:2017, AIAG SPC Manual 2nd Ed., AIAG MSA 4th Ed.

inScope: Process Capability — Cpk, Ppk, DPMO & Sigma Level from Measurement Data
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Process Short-Term Standard Deviation (σ_ST / s̄/d₂)
inputs.description: From control chart: R̄/d₂ or s̄/c₄; for Ppk use overall std deviation s

inputs.label: Process Long-Term Standard Deviation (σ_LT / s_overall)
inputs.description: Overall std dev from all data points (includes between-subgroup variation); used for Ppk

inputs.label: Total Number of Measurements (n)
inputs.description: Minimum 30 per AIAG MSA; minimum 50 recommended for reliable Ppk

inputs.label: Gauge R&R as % of Tolerance (GRR%)
inputs.description: AIAG MSA 4th Ed.: GRR% < 10% = acceptable; 10–30% = marginal; > 30% = unacceptable

inputs.label: Number of Defect Opportunities per Unit (O)
inputs.description: For DPMO calculation: O=1 for single CTQ; multi-characteristic assembly O=10–100

standards.name: Process Capability — Cpk, Ppk, DPMO & Sigma Level from Measurement Data
standards.description: Process Capability — Cpk, Ppk, DPMO & Sigma Level from Measurement Data — Quality Engineering / Six Sigma

formulas.expression: Cpu = (USL - process_mean) / (3 * process_std_dev); Cpl = (process_mean - LSL) / (3 * process_std_dev); Cpk = Math.min(Cpu, Cpl)
Ppu = (USL - process_mean) / (3 * process_std_dev_lt); Ppl = (process_mean - LSL) / (3 * process_std_dev_lt); Ppk = Math.min(Ppu, Ppl)

Z_upper = (USL - process_mean) / process_std_dev_lt; Z_lower = (process_mean - LSL) / process_std_dev_lt; p_defect = (1 - 0.5*(1+Math.sign(Z_upper)*Math.min(1, Math.abs(Z_upper)*0.3989))) + (0.5*(1+Math.sign(Z_lower)*Math.min(1, Math.abs(Z_lower)*0.3989)) - 0); DPMO = p_defect * 1e6 / defect_opportunity_per_unit
sigma_true = Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, process_std_dev^2 - Math.pow(gage_RR_pct/100*(USL-LSL)/6, 2))); Cpk_adj = (USL - LSL) / (6 * sigma_true) * (Cpk/Cp)

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: USL <= LSL
fmea.effect: USL must exceed LSL — check specification limit inputs
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: gage_RR_pct > 30
fmea.effect: GRR% > 30%: measurement system is inadequate per AIAG MSA — Cpk values are unreliable; improve gauge before process study
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: process_std_dev_lt < process_std_dev
fmea.effect: Long-term σ < short-term σ: statistically impossible — verify correct assignment of within-subgroup vs overall standard deviation
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Cpk < 1.33: below IATF 16949 / automotive PPAP minimum — process not capable for launch; corrective action plan mandatory
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Cpk < 1.33

fmea.failureMode: Cpk > 1.0 but Ppk < 1.0: process capable short-term but unstable long-term — identify and eliminate special causes per SPC reaction plan
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Cpk > 1.0 && Ppk < 1.0

fmea.failureMode: Centering imbalance |Cpu − Cpl| > 0.3: process shifted off-target — adjust process mean; off-centre processes waste specification width
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Math.abs(Cpu - Cpl) > 0.3

fmea.failureMode: DPMO > 3400: below 4.5σ level — customer escape risk significant; initiate DMAIC improvement project
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: DPMO > 3400

fmea.failureMode: Sample size < 30: insufficient for reliable Cpk/Ppk estimation — confidence interval on Cpk is very wide; collect minimum 30–50 points before reporting
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: sample_size_n < 30

legalNotice: Technical simulation; not financial/legal/engineering advice. Verify before business decisions.

name: Wire Rope Sling — Safe Working Load, D/d Ratio Derating & Fatigue Life Assessment
subtitle: Lifting & Rigging / Material Handling Safety — ISO 2408:2023, ASME B30.9-2022, EN 13414-1:2003

inScope: Wire Rope Sling — Safe Working Load, D/d Ratio Derating & Fatigue Life Assessment
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Wire Rope Grade / Minimum Breaking Force Category
Sheave / Hook Radius of Contact (D_sheave)
inputs.description: For hook contact in basket/choker: D = hook groove diameter; ISO 2408 §8

standards.name: Wire Rope Sling — Safe Working Load, D/d Ratio Derating & Fatigue Life Assessment
standards.description: Wire Rope Sling — Safe Working Load, D/d Ratio Derating & Fatigue Life Assessment — Lifting & Rigging / Material Handling Safety

formulas.expression: N_fatigue = Math.pow(bend_eff * MBF_kn / (SWL_eff_kn * design_factor), 3) * 100000; years_life = N_fatigue / lift_cycles_per_year

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: Dd_ratio < 8
fmea.effect: D/d < 8: extreme bending — rope fatigue life is negligible; minimum D/d = 12 for sling service per ISO 2408 §8
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: sling_configuration === 0.75 && design_factor < 6
fmea.effect: Choker hitch with DF < 6: pinching reduces effective breaking load unpredictably — apply DF ≥ 6 for choker per ASME B30.9
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: years_life < 1 && lift_cycles_per_year > 100
fmea.effect: Estimated fatigue life < 1 year: high-cycle duty — implement formal inspection programme at minimum 3-month intervals per EN 13414
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: D/d < 18: significant bending penalty (efficiency < 90%) — replace contact hardware with larger radius hook or thimble; or upsize rope
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Dd_ratio < 18

fmea.failureMode: Bending efficiency < 75%: severe rope fatigue zone — mandatory inspection after every 50 lift cycles per LEEA COPSULE §7
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: bend_eff < 0.75

fmea.failureMode: Single-leg vertical: simplest configuration — confirm load centre of gravity alignment; off-vertical > 5° effectively applies choker mode factor
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: sling_configuration === 1.0 && design_factor === 5

fmea.failureMode: High-grade rope with small D/d: high-strength wires are more notch-sensitive — bending fatigue is disproportionately severe; use D/d ≥ 25 for Rr ≥ 1960
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: rope_grade >= 1960 && Dd_ratio < 20

fmea.failureMode: High-cycle application (>5000 cycles/yr): wire rope slings unsuitable — consider chain slings or permanent rigging with engineered fatigue life per ISO 1704
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: lift_cycles_per_year > 5000

legalNotice: Technical simulation; not financial/legal/engineering advice. Verify before business decisions.

name: Grid-Tied PV System Sizing — Array Capacity, Annual Yield, Performance Ratio & Financial ROI
subtitle: Renewable Energy / Electrical Engineering — IEC 61215:2021 (module qualification), IEC 61730-1:2021 (safety), IEC 61724-1:2021 (monitoring)

inScope: Grid-Tied PV System Sizing — Array Capacity, Annual Yield, Performance Ratio & Financial ROI
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Peak Sun Hours at Site (PSH)
inputs.description: From NASA POWER / PVGIS irradiance database for location; annual average daily insolation at optimal tilt

inputs.label: PV Module Rated Power (STC) per Panel
inputs.description: STC: 1000 W/m², 25°C, AM1.5 — IEC 61215 rating

inputs.label: Total System Losses (soiling, wiring, MPPT, mismatch, shading)
inputs.description: IEC 61724-1 loss budget: inverter 3%; soiling 3%; wiring 2%; MPPT 2%; temp derating 5–10%

inputs.label: Module Power Temperature Coefficient (γ_Pmax)
inputs.description: Typical mono-PERC: −0.37 to −0.40 %/°C; TOPCon: −0.30 %/°C — from datasheet

inputs.label: Average Operating Cell Temperature (T_cell,avg)
inputs.description: T_cell = T_amb + NOCT − 20°C; NOCT ≈ 42–47°C; cell runs 20–30°C above ambient at peak

inputs.label: Total Installed System Cost (CAPEX)
inputs.description: Utility-scale 2024 ≈ 0.60–0.85 USD/Wp; commercial rooftop ≈ 0.90–1.20 USD/Wp

standards.name: Grid-Tied PV System Sizing — Array Capacity, Annual Yield, Performance Ratio & Financial ROI
standards.description: Grid-Tied PV System Sizing — Array Capacity, Annual Yield, Performance Ratio & Financial ROI — Renewable Energy / Electrical Engineering

formulas.expression: N_modules = Math.ceil(P_array_kwp * 1000 / module_wp); E_yield_kwh = P_array_kwp * PSH_h_day * 365 * PR
CAPEX_usd = P_array_kwp * 1000 * installed_cost_usd_wp; annual_saving_usd = E_yield_kwh * electricity_rate_usd_kwh
payback_yr = CAPEX_usd / annual_saving_usd; specific_yield_kwh_kwp = E_yield_kwh / P_array_kwp

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: PR < 0.65
fmea.effect: Performance ratio < 0.65: exceptionally low — verify loss inputs; shading, soiling, and temperature derating may be overstated
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: specific_yield_kwh_kwp < 700 && PSH_h_day > 3
fmea.effect: Specific yield < 700 kWh/kWp despite adequate PSH: large system losses — re-examine soiling, shading, or inverter sizing
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: payback_yr > 20
fmea.effect: Payback > 20 years: marginal project economics — re-evaluate CAPEX, tariff structure, and incentives (ITC, MACRS, FiT)
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Cell temperature > 60°C: severe thermal derating — evaluate bifacial modules with elevated racking, ventilated mounting, or high-NOCT-resistant technology
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: avg_cell_temp_c > 60

fmea.failureMode: System losses > 25%: excessive — each 1% loss reduces yield by ~600 kWh/MWp/yr; audit soiling frequency, cable sizing, and inverter clipping
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: system_losses_pct > 25

fmea.failureMode: PR < 0.78: below IEC 61724 benchmark for well-designed systems — opportunity for O&M optimisation; cleaning and loss audit recommended
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: PR < 0.78

fmea.failureMode: Large array at high CAPEX/Wp: utility-scale pricing should be below 0.85 USD/Wp — renegotiate EPC contract or review scope
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: P_array_kwp > 1000 && installed_cost_usd_wp > 1.0

fmea.failureMode: Payback < 5 years: strong project economics — confirm energy model with P90 yield (10th percentile) for bankability assessment per IFC PS3
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: payback_yr < 5

name: Shallow Foundation Bearing Capacity — Ultimate & Allowable Load per Terzaghi-Meyerhof
subtitle: Geotechnical Engineering / Foundation Design — Terzaghi (1943) / Meyerhof (1963/1976), EN 1997-1:2004 (EC7) §6.5.3, ASCE 7-22 §12.13

inScope: Shallow Foundation Bearing Capacity — Ultimate & Allowable Load per Terzaghi-Meyerhof
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Soil Cohesion Intercept (c')
inputs.description: Undrained: c_u from vane shear or UU triaxial; drained: c' from CD/CU triaxial with pore pressure

inputs.label: Soil Friction Angle (φ')
inputs.description: Loose sand ≈ 28–32°; dense sand ≈ 35–42°; soft clay φ_u=0 (undrained)

inputs.label: Unit Weight of Soil (γ)
inputs.description: Saturated sand ≈ 19–21; clay ≈ 16–20; loose fill ≈ 14–17 kN/m³

inputs.label: Foundation Length (L)
inputs.description: For strip footings: L >> B; enter L = 10×B; for square: L = B

inputs.label: Depth to Groundwater Table (D_w)
inputs.description: GWT at or above D_f requires buoyant unit weight γ' = γ_sat − γ_w in bearing capacity

standards.name: Shallow Foundation Bearing Capacity — Ultimate & Allowable Load per Terzaghi-Meyerhof
standards.description: Shallow Foundation Bearing Capacity — Ultimate & Allowable Load per Terzaghi-Meyerhof — Geotechnical Engineering / Foundation Design

formulas.expression: phi_rad = phi_deg * Math.PI / 180; Nq = Math.exp(Math.PI * Math.tan(phi_rad)) * Math.pow(Math.tan(Math.PI/4 + phi_rad/2), 2); Nc = (phi_deg > 0) ? (Nq - 1) / Math.tan(phi_rad) : 5.14; Ng = 2 * (Nq + 1) * Math.tan(phi_rad)
B_L = foundation_width_m / foundation_length_m; sc = 1 + B_L * Nq / Nc; sq = 1 + B_L * Math.tan(phi_rad); sg = Math.max(0.6, 1 - 0.4 * B_L)
gamma_eff = (groundwater_depth_m <= foundation_depth_m) ? gamma_soil_kn_m3 - 9.81 : gamma_soil_kn_m3; q_overburden_kpa = gamma_soil_kn_m3 * foundation_depth_m
q_ult_kpa = cohesion_kpa * Nc * sc + q_overburden_kpa * Nq * sq + 0.5 * gamma_eff * foundation_width_m * Ng * sg
q_net_ult_kpa = q_ult_kpa - q_overburden_kpa; q_allowable_kpa = q_net_ult_kpa / FOS_target + q_overburden_kpa

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: phi_deg === 0 && cohesion_kpa === 0
fmea.effect: Both c and φ are zero: soil has no shear strength — check soil parameters; at minimum one parameter must be non-zero
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: groundwater_depth_m < foundation_depth_m && gamma_eff > 12
fmea.effect: GWT above foundation level but gamma_eff appears too high — verify buoyant unit weight γ' = γ_sat − 9.81 is applied correctly
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: q_allowable_kpa > 600 && phi_deg < 35
fmea.effect: Very high allowable pressure for moderate friction angle: verify soil parameters with in-situ testing (SPT/CPT) before finalising
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Foundation depth < 0.5 m: shallow embedment vulnerable to frost heave, erosion, and surface disturbance — minimum 0.6 m below frost line per ASCE 7
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: foundation_depth_m < 0.5

fmea.failureMode: Very high friction angle (>40°): verify with laboratory tests — field estimates of φ > 40° are often optimistic; use conservative lower bound
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: phi_deg > 40 && cohesion_kpa === 0

fmea.failureMode: GWT within influence zone (D_w < D_f + B): full buoyant correction required for γ in N_γ term — EC7 §6.5.3(4) applies
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: groundwater_depth_m < foundation_depth_m + foundation_width_m

fmea.failureMode: FOS < 2.5 for cohesionless soil: increased uncertainty in φ and soil variability — EC7 recommends partial factor approach (γ_φ = 1.25) as verification
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: FOS_target < 2.5 && cohesion_kpa === 0

fmea.failureMode: Square/circular footing: shape factors significantly increase capacity vs strip — verify punching shear capacity of footing in structural design
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: foundation_width_m / foundation_length_m > 0.9

legalNotice: Technical simulation; not financial/legal/engineering advice. Verify before business decisions.

name: Centrifugal Fan Selection — Specific Speed, Tip Speed, Blade Loading & Noise Rating
subtitle: Fluid Systems / HVAC / Industrial Ventilation — ISO 13349:2010 (fan terminology), AMCA 210-16 (performance test), EN ISO 5801:2017

inputs.label: Fan Total Efficiency (η_fan) at Design Point
inputs.description: Centrifugal backward-curved: 70–85%; forward-curved: 55–70%; axial: 75–88%

inputs.label: Air / Gas Density at Fan Inlet (ρ)

standards.name: Centrifugal Fan Selection — Specific Speed, Tip Speed, Blade Loading & Noise Rating
standards.description: Centrifugal Fan Selection — Specific Speed, Tip Speed, Blade Loading & Noise Rating — Fluid Systems / HVAC / Industrial Ventilation

formulas.expression: omega_rad_s = n_fan_rpm * 2 * Math.PI / 60; Ns_dim = omega_rad_s * Math.sqrt(Q_m3s) / Math.pow(dP_fan_pa / rho_air_kg_m3, 0.75)

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: u2_m_s > 150 && blade_type === 'backward'
fmea.effect: Tip speed > 150 m/s for BC fan: stress limit exceeded for standard steel impeller — reduce speed or use high-tensile alloy; verify per ISO 13349 §6.4
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: u2_m_s > 60 && blade_type === 'forward'
fmea.effect: FC fan tip speed > 60 m/s: blade bending stress critical — forward-curved blades have low structural efficiency; FC fans unsuitable above 60 m/s
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: psi > 0.9
fmea.effect: Pressure coefficient ψ > 0.9: overloaded impeller — fan operating far from design point; surge and aerodynamic instability risk
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Specific speed outside centrifugal fan optimal range (0.2–2.5): consider axial fan (Ns > 2.5) or different impeller type — efficiency will be poor
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Ns_dim < 0.2 || Ns_dim > 2.5

fmea.failureMode: Forward-curved fan at high pressure: FC fans have overloading characteristic — motor may trip; backward-curved or radial tip preferred above 1500 Pa
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: blade_type === 'forward' && dP_fan_pa > 1500

fmea.failureMode: Estimated sound power > 95 dB(A): high-noise installation — acoustic treatment, silencer, or vibration isolation required; OSHA noise assessment mandatory
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Lw_estimated_dB > 95

fmea.failureMode: Fan efficiency < 60%: poor energy performance — consider replacing with backward-curved or airfoil blade design; each 10% η improvement reduces motor kW proportionally
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: fan_efficiency_pct < 60

fmea.failureMode: Blade passage frequency > 500 Hz: mid-frequency tonal noise — structural resonance check of ductwork at BPF mandatory; add flexible connection at fan outlet
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: BPF_hz > 500

name: Elevated Storage Tank — Shell Hoop Stress, Hydrostatic Pressure & Wind Overturning Stability
subtitle: Civil / Structural / Water Infrastructure — AWWA D100-11 (Welded Carbon Steel Tanks), API 650 12th Ed., EN 1993-4-2:2007

inScope: Elevated Storage Tank — Shell Hoop Stress, Hydrostatic Pressure & Wind Overturning Stability
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Design Wind Speed (V_design)
inputs.description: 3-second gust speed at 10 m height for site — ASCE 7-22 Fig. 26.5-1A or national wind map

inputs.label: Weld Joint Efficiency (E)
inputs.description: API 650 §5.2 / AWWA D100 — joint efficiency by radiographic inspection class

standards.name: Elevated Storage Tank — Shell Hoop Stress, Hydrostatic Pressure & Wind Overturning Stability
standards.description: Elevated Storage Tank — Shell Hoop Stress, Hydrostatic Pressure & Wind Overturning Stability — Civil / Structural / Water Infrastructure

formulas.expression: sigma_allow_mpa = joint_efficiency_E * Fy_mpa / 1.5; hoop_DCR = sigma_hoop_mpa / sigma_allow_mpa

Cd_tank = 0.6; A_proj_m2 = tank_diameter_m * water_height_m; q_wind_pa = 0.5 * 1.25 * Math.pow(design_wind_speed_m_s, 2); F_wind_kn = Cd_tank * q_wind_pa * A_proj_m2 / 1000; H_centroid_m = support_height_m + water_height_m / 2; M_OT_knm = F_wind_kn * H_centroid_m
W_water_kn = 9.81 * (Math.PI/4 * Math.pow(tank_diameter_m, 2) * water_height_m * 1000) / 1000; W_total_kn = tank_empty_weight_kn + W_water_kn; M_restore_knm = W_total_kn * tank_diameter_m / 2

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: hoop_DCR > 1.0
fmea.effect: Hoop stress exceeds allowable: shell wall thickness insufficient — increase shell thickness or reduce water depth per AWWA D100 §14.2
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: OTF < 1.5
fmea.effect: Overturning safety factor < 1.5: wind stability not met — anchor tank to foundation or increase base diameter; evaluate seismic per ASCE 7-22 §15.4
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: tank_diameter_m / shell_thickness_mm * 1000 > 300
fmea.effect: D/t ratio > 300: thin shell — check buckling under wind external pressure per API 650 Annex V and EN 1993-4-2 §5.3
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Hoop utilisation > 85%: marginal shell capacity — verify corrosion allowance is maintained over design life; 1 mm corrosion reduces capacity by ~5% on 20 mm plate
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: hoop_DCR > 0.85

fmea.failureMode: Elevated tank with marginal OTF: tall structures amplify wind overturning — detailed dynamic analysis and anchor bolt design required per ASCE 7-22 §15.7
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: OTF < 2.0 && support_height_m > 15

fmea.failureMode: Design wind speed > 60 m/s: hurricane / typhoon zone — enhanced wind analysis per ASCE 7-22 §26.11 and wind tunnel study recommended for D > 20 m
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: design_wind_speed_m_s > 60

fmea.failureMode: Non-radiographed welds on deep tank: upgrade to Class 2 (spot RT) minimum — AWWA D100 requires RT for shells above 5 m water depth in Class B service
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: joint_efficiency_E < 0.85 && water_height_m > 10

fmea.failureMode: Support height > 20 m: structural analysis of support columns/pedestal under combined gravity, wind, and seismic mandatory per ASCE 7-22 §15.4.2
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: support_height_m > 20

legalNotice: Technical simulation; not financial/legal/engineering advice. Verify before business decisions.

name: Hydraulic Cylinder Actuator Sizing — Bore, Rod, Force, Speed & Buckling Check
subtitle: Fluid Power / Hydraulic Systems — ISO 6020-2:2015 (cylinder dimensions), ISO 6022:1981 (flow/speed), ISO 6020-2 Annex B (buckling)

inScope: Hydraulic Cylinder Actuator Sizing — Bore, Rod, Force, Speed & Buckling Check
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: System Operating Pressure (P_sys)
inputs.description: Industrial hydraulic: 150–350 bar; mobile: 250–450 bar; high-pressure: up to 700 bar

inputs.label: Back Pressure on Return Side (P_back)
inputs.description: Tank line back pressure; typical 3–10 bar; higher with counterbalance valves

inputs.label: Cylinder Mounting / Buckling Condition (Euler case)
inputs.description: Most hydraulic cylinders: pin-pin (k=1.0) or fixed-pin (k=0.7) per ISO 6020 mounting

standards.name: Hydraulic Cylinder Actuator Sizing — Bore, Rod, Force, Speed & Buckling Check
standards.description: Hydraulic Cylinder Actuator Sizing — Bore, Rod, Force, Speed & Buckling Check — Fluid Power / Hydraulic Systems

formulas.expression: P_net_bar = system_pressure_bar - back_pressure_bar; A_bore_cm2 = extend_force_kn * 10 / P_net_bar; D_bore_mm = 2 * Math.sqrt(A_bore_cm2 / Math.PI) * 10

A_bore_m2 = Math.PI/4 * Math.pow(D_bore_mm/1000, 2); A_ann_req_m2 = retract_force_kn * 1000 / ((system_pressure_bar - back_pressure_bar) * 1e5); A_rod_m2 = A_bore_m2 - A_ann_req_m2; D_rod_mm = 2 * Math.sqrt(Math.max(A_rod_m2, 0.001) / Math.PI) * 1000
A_bore_m2_act = Math.PI/4 * Math.pow(D_bore_mm/1000, 2); Q_ext_lpm = A_bore_m2_act * extend_speed_mm_s / 1000 * 1000 * 60
E_steel = 210000; I_rod = Math.PI/64 * Math.pow(D_rod_mm, 4); L_eff_mm = mounting_condition * stroke_mm; F_cr_kn = Math.pow(Math.PI, 2) * E_steel * I_rod / Math.pow(L_eff_mm, 2) / 1e6
A_rod_act_mm2 = Math.PI/4 * Math.pow(D_rod_mm, 2); sigma_rod_mpa = extend_force_kn * 1000 / A_rod_act_mm2; rod_util = sigma_rod_mpa / (rod_material_yield_mpa / 2)

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: SF_buck < 3.0
fmea.effect: Buckling safety factor < 3.0: rod buckling risk — increase rod diameter, reduce effective length, or change mounting to fixed-pinned (k=0.7)
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: rod_util > 1.0
fmea.effect: Rod compressive stress exceeds allowable (S_y/2): rod failure risk — increase rod diameter or upgrade material grade
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: D_rod_mm > D_bore_mm * 0.7
fmea.effect: Rod diameter > 70% of bore: very small annular area — retraction force may be inadequate; consider differential circuit or tandem cylinder
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Low buckling SF at high speed: dynamic loads from deceleration shock amplify column force — target SF ≥ 5 for speeds > 200 mm/s per Parker handbook §4
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: SF_buck < 5 && extend_speed_mm_s > 200

fmea.failureMode: Flow demand > 200 L/min: verify pump capacity and line sizing — pressure drop in supply line will reduce effective force; use ΔP = 0.003 L/D·v²·ρ for line check
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Q_ext_lpm > 200

fmea.failureMode: System pressure > 350 bar: high-pressure category — NFPA T3.6.7 Class 5000 psi seals and fittings required; hydraulic shock transients may exceed 500 bar
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: system_pressure_bar > 350

fmea.failureMode: Long stroke with pin-pin mounting: effective buckling length equals full stroke — consider intermediate rod support or reduce to fixed-pin mounting
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: stroke_mm > 3000 && mounting_condition >= 1.0

fmea.failureMode: Back pressure > 20 bar: high counterbalance valve setting — reduces net extension force significantly; verify thermal relief valve setting is ≥ P_back + 20% per ISO 6022
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: back_pressure_bar > 20

name: Power Cable Ampacity, Derating & Voltage Drop Sizing — LV / MV Distribution
subtitle: Electrical Engineering / Cable Design — IEC 60364-5-52:2009, IEC 60228:2004, NEC Article 310 (2023)

Math.sqrt(3) * load_current_a * (R_total * pf + X_total * sin_phi) : 2 * load_current_a * (R_total * pf + X_total * sin_phi)

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: amp_util > 1.0
fmea.effect: Load current exceeds derated ampacity: cable will overheat — upsize conductor cross-section or reduce grouping density
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: dU_pct > 5
fmea.effect: Voltage drop > 5%: exceeds IEC 60364 recommendation — upsize cable or reduce run length; motor starting and equipment performance affected
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: grouping_factor < 0.6 && amp_util > 0.8
fmea.effect: Heavy grouping derating at high utilisation: thermal accumulation risk in cable bundle — verify bundle temperature with IEEE 835 or IEC 60287 detailed calculation
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Voltage drop > 3% on LV system: motor terminal voltage will drop below 95% of rated — IEC 60034-1 requires ±5% supply voltage tolerance; upsize cable
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: dU_pct > 3 && supply_voltage_v === 400

fmea.failureMode: Ampacity utilisation > 85%: limited headroom for future load growth or harmonic derating — consider upsize to next standard cross-section
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: amp_util > 0.85

fmea.failureMode: PVC cable in high-ambient environment: C_t severely derated above 40°C — upgrade to XLPE (90°C) insulation for 40–60°C installations
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: ambient_temp_c > 40 && max_conductor_temp_c === 70

fmea.failureMode: Long 400 V run (>500 m): voltage drop likely dominates over ampacity — size cable for ΔU ≤ 3%, not ampacity; significant upsize typically required
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: cable_length_m > 500 && supply_voltage_v === 400

fmea.failureMode: Large cables in groups: skin and proximity effect add to AC resistance — verify with IEC 60287-1-1 AC resistance correction for cables > 150 mm²
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: cable_mm2 >= 300 && grouping_factor < 0.70

name: EOQ, Reorder Point & Safety Stock Optimisation with Demand & Lead Time Variability
subtitle: Supply Chain / Inventory Management — APICS CPIM Exam Content Manual, ISO 28000:2022 (supply chain security), Silver-Pyke-Thomas 'Inventory Management & Production Planning' 3rd Ed.

inScope: EOQ, Reorder Point & Safety Stock Optimisation with Demand & Lead Time Variability
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Cost per Purchase Order (S)
inputs.description: Include: admin time, receiving, inspection, system processing per order event

inputs.label: Annual Inventory Holding Cost Rate (h)
inputs.description: Typical 20–30%: capital cost of inventory + warehouse + obsolescence + insurance

inputs.label: Lead Time Standard Deviation (σ_L)
inputs.description: Measure from historical PO data; σ_L = 0 for fixed lead time

inputs.label: Daily Demand Standard Deviation (σ_d)
inputs.description: σ_d from historical demand data; σ_d = 0 for deterministic demand

standards.name: EOQ, Reorder Point & Safety Stock Optimisation with Demand & Lead Time Variability
standards.description: EOQ, Reorder Point & Safety Stock Optimisation with Demand & Lead Time Variability — Supply Chain / Inventory Management

formulas.expression: H_usd = unit_cost_usd * holding_rate_pct / 100; EOQ = Math.sqrt((2 * annual_demand_units * ordering_cost_usd) / H_usd)
d_avg_day = annual_demand_units / 365; sigma_dLT = Math.sqrt(lead_time_days * Math.pow(demand_std_day, 2) + Math.pow(d_avg_day, 2) * Math.pow(lead_time_std_days, 2)); SS = z * sigma_dLT
d_avg_day = annual_demand_units / 365; ROP = d_avg_day * lead_time_days + SS
H_usd = unit_cost_usd * holding_rate_pct / 100; TAC_usd = (EOQ/2 + SS) * H_usd + (annual_demand_units / EOQ) * ordering_cost_usd

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: demand_std_day > annual_demand_units / 365 * 0.5
fmea.effect: Daily demand CV > 50%: extremely high variability — safety stock will be very large; consider demand smoothing or VMI arrangement with supplier
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: lead_time_std_days > lead_time_days * 0.3
fmea.effect: Lead time CV > 30%: unreliable supplier — safety stock dominated by supply uncertainty; negotiate lead time reliability or qualify second source
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: SS > EOQ * 2
fmea.effect: Safety stock > 2× EOQ: carrying cost heavily influenced by uncertainty — re-evaluate service level target or work to reduce lead time variability
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: More than 52 orders per year: weekly ordering frequency — evaluate blanket PO or kanban system to reduce transaction costs
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: orders_per_yr > 52

fmea.failureMode: Cycle time > 90 days: large batch order — obsolescence and damage risk increases with long holding periods; verify shelf life vs cycle time
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: T_cycle_days > 90

fmea.failureMode: High service level (≥99%) with variable demand: safety stock cost increases exponentially above 97.5% — verify cost of stockout justifies the holding cost premium
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: service_level_pct >= 99 && demand_std_day > 0

fmea.failureMode: High-value item with large EOQ: capital tied up in inventory is significant — consider just-in-time or consignment stock arrangement to reduce order quantity
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: unit_cost_usd > 1000 && EOQ > 100

fmea.failureMode: Holding rate < 15%: may understate true cost — verify capital cost of inventory (WACC), storage cost, and obsolescence risk are fully included
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: holding_rate_pct < 15

legalNotice: Technical simulation; not financial/legal/engineering advice. Verify before business decisions.

name: Pipe & Vessel Thermal Insulation Thickness — Economic & Process Optimisation
subtitle: Thermal Engineering / Energy Management — ISO 12241:1998 (EN ISO 12241:2022), ASTM C680-21, CINI Manual for Industrial Insulation

inScope: Pipe & Vessel Thermal Insulation Thickness — Economic & Process Optimisation
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Insulation Thermal Conductivity (λ_ins)
inputs.description: Mineral wool at 100°C ≈ 0.045; PIR foam ≈ 0.025; calcium silicate ≈ 0.065 W/(m·K)

inputs.label: Outer Surface Heat Transfer Coefficient (h_o)
inputs.description: Natural convection + radiation still air ≈ 8–12 W/(m²·K); wind-swept outdoor ≈ 20–30

inputs.label: Energy Cost (Heat / Fuel)
inputs.description: Natural gas ≈ 5–10 USD/GJ; steam ≈ 15–25 USD/GJ; electricity ≈ 25–40 USD/GJ

standards.name: Pipe & Vessel Thermal Insulation Thickness — Economic & Process Optimisation
standards.description: Pipe & Vessel Thermal Insulation Thickness — Economic & Process Optimisation — Thermal Engineering / Energy Management

R_ins = Math.log(r2_m / r1_m) / (2 * Math.PI * lambda_ins_w_mk); R_conv = 1 / (2 * Math.PI * r2_m * h_outer_w_m2k); R_total = R_ins + R_conv
E_loss_gj_yr = q_L_w_m * operating_hours_yr * 3600 / 1e9; cost_loss_usd_yr = E_loss_gj_yr * energy_cost_usd_gj
T_surface_c = T_ambient_c + q_L_w_m / (2 * Math.PI * r2_m * h_outer_w_m2k)

fmea.effect: Insulated radius < critical radius: adding insulation increases heat loss on this small pipe — minimum thickness is r_cr − r1; verify application intent
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: T_process_c < T_ambient_c && T_surface_c > T_ambient_c - 5

fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: T_surface_c > 50 && T_process_c > 80

fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: lambda_ins_w_mk > 0.08 && delta_T > 200

name: Flare Stack Thermal Radiation — Exclusion Zone, Flame Length & Stack Height
subtitle: Process Safety / Oil & Gas / Environmental — API 521 7th Ed. 2020 §5.15, API 537 3rd Ed. 2017, ISO 23251:2006 (equivalent to API 521)

inScope: Flare Stack Thermal Radiation — Exclusion Zone, Flame Length & Stack Height

inputs.label: Flare Gas Lower Heating Value (LHV)

inputs.label: Flare Combustion Efficiency (η_c)

standards.description: Flare Stack Thermal Radiation — Exclusion Zone, Flame Length & Stack Height — Process Safety / Oil & Gas / Environmental

D_from_base = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(D_excl_m, 2) - Math.pow(flame_tip_X_m, 2)); H_min_m = Math.max(D_from_base - flame_tip_H_m + stack_height_m, stack_height_m)

fmea.effect: Proposed stack height below minimum required: exclusion zone at ground level is violated — increase stack height to H_min or relocate facilities beyond D_excl
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: combustion_efficiency_pct < 96 && relief_flow_kg_h > 10000
fmea.effect: Low combustion efficiency at high flow: significant unburned hydrocarbon and black smoke — verify flare tip design and steam/air assist per API 537 §5.4
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: fraction_heat_radiated_F > 0.30
fmea.effect: F > 0.30: heavy luminous flame (smoking) — smoking flare radiates more heat; address air/steam assist or switch to enclosed flare to reduce F below 0.20
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Exclusion zone > 500 m: major hazard area — review relief system design, consider staged blowdown or enclosed ground flare to reduce peak flow
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: D_excl_m > 500

fmea.failureMode: Flame power > 100 MW: large flare event — noise assessment mandatory; stack structural loading under wind and thermal cycling must be verified per API 560 §7
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Q_f_kw > 100000

fmea.failureMode: High wind deflection: flame centre shifts significantly downwind — re-calculate exclusion zone at wind direction perpendicular to access road
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: wind_speed_m_s > 15 && flame_tip_X_m > stack_height_m * 0.5

fmea.failureMode: Personnel exclusion zone > 200 m: verify no permanent occupied facilities within zone; update HAZOP and site emergency response plan
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: allowable_radiation_kw_m2 < 3.16 && D_excl_m > 200

fmea.failureMode: Combustion efficiency < 98%: regulatory compliance risk — US 40 CFR Part 60 Subpart Ja requires ≥ 96.5% DRE; EU IED requires BAT-AEL assessment
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: combustion_efficiency_pct < 98

W_material_kn_m = capacity_t_h * 9.81 * conveyor_length_m / 3600 / screw_speed_rpm * 60 / (2 * Math.PI); T_friction_knm = 0.055 * Math.pow(screw_diameter_mm / 1000, 3) * bulk_density_kg_m3 * conveyor_length_m * material_factor_Fm / 1000; T_drive_knm = W_material_kn_m + T_friction_knm

fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

name: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone
subtitle: Process Safety / Environmental Engineering — EPA 40 CFR Part 68 RMP §68.22, NIOSH IDLH database, Pasquill-Gifford / Turner (1994)

inScope: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Wind Speed at 10 m Height (u_10)
inputs.description: Worst case (IDLH zone largest) typically at low wind speed 1–2 m/s; EPA RMP uses 3 m/s

inputs.label: Pasquill-Gifford Atmospheric Stability Class
inputs.description: Worst-case for dense gas: F class; worst-case for buoyant release: A class; EPA RMP default: F/D

inputs.label: Effective Release Height (H_s)
inputs.description: Ground-level release: H_s = 0; elevated flange: H_s = stack height + thermal rise (Briggs)

inputs.label: IDLH Concentration of Gas (Immediately Dangerous to Life/Health)
inputs.description: NIOSH IDLH: H₂S = 100 ppm; NH₃ = 300 ppm; Cl₂ = 10 ppm; HCN = 50 ppm; CO = 1200 ppm

inputs.label: Gas Molecular Weight (M)
inputs.description: H₂S=34; NH₃=17; Cl₂=71; HCN=27; CO=28; SO₂=64; CH₄=16

standards.name: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone
standards.description: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone — Process Safety / Environmental Engineering

formulas.expression: C_kg_m3 = release_rate_kg_s / (Math.PI * sigma_y * sigma_z * wind_speed_m_s) * Math.exp(-0.5 * Math.pow(release_height_m / sigma_z, 2)); C_ppm = C_kg_m3 * 1e6 / (molecular_weight_g_mol / 1000) * 22.4 / molecular_weight_g_mol * 1000
ERPG2_approx_ppm = IDLH_ppm * 0.3; time_in_zone_s = D_IDLH_m / wind_speed_m_s; TL = C_ppm * Math.pow(time_in_zone_s / 600, 1.0)

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: dense_gas && release_height_m === 0
fmea.effect: Dense gas at ground level: Gaussian model underestimates exclusion zone — use SLAB, PHAST, or ALOHA dense gas model for regulatory compliance
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: wind_speed_m_s < 1.0
fmea.effect: Wind speed < 1 m/s: Gaussian model breakdown — calm conditions; IDLH zone will be very large; use EPA RMP worst-case 1.5 m/s minimum
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Input violation: D_IDLH_m > 1000
fmea.effect: IDLH exclusion zone > 1 km: major accident scenario — off-site consequence analysis and public notification required per EPA RMP §68.10
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Worst-case dispersion conditions (Class F, low wind): exclusion zone maximised — this scenario governs emergency planning zone; shelter-in-place radius = D_IDLH
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: stability_class === 'F' && wind_speed_m_s < 2

fmea.failureMode: Very toxic gas (IDLH < 50 ppm): small release rates generate large exclusion zones — verify passive mitigation (water curtain, scrubber) reduces source term
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: IDLH_ppm < 50

fmea.failureMode: Large zone in urban terrain: building effects invalidate Gaussian model; use AERMOD or CFD simulation for planning purposes per EPA guidance
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: D_IDLH_m > 500 && terrain_type === 'urban'

fmea.failureMode: Large ground-level release: immediate shelter-in-place or evacuation of D_IDLH radius; notify emergency services per OSHA PSM 29 CFR 1910.119
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: release_height_m === 0 && release_rate_kg_s > 1

fmea.failureMode: Transit time through IDLH zone > 10 min: self-contained breathing apparatus (SCBA) mandatory for emergency responders entering zone per OSHA §1910.134
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: time_in_zone_s > 600
